name: Certificate Updater
description: Applies mounted corporate CA certificates to the container trust store

sourceCertificateDirectory.description: Optional directory containing mounted custom CA certificates to copy into the detected or explicit certDirectory before updating trust

certDirectory.description: Directory containing custom CA certificates. Defaults to the detected trust-store directory for the available CA update command.

required.description: Fail if no custom CA certificates are found

testCertificate.description: Generate a temporary test CA certificate for feature testing
